final_prompt.prompt:

Scene/backdrop: warm autumn ambiance, golden hour light
Lighting/mood: warm tones, golden hour, soft and tranquil
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: 
Avoid:
